samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="shift" value="[1:0]">
            <item>shift_0=0</item>
            <item>shift_1=1</item>
            <item>shift_2=2</item>
            <item>shift_3=3</item>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[15:0]" id="product_nxt">product</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]" id="A_nxt">A</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[7:0]" id="B_nxt">B</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="shift_nxt">shift</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[15:0]" id="product_temp_nxt">product_temp</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="shift_temp_nxt">shift_temp</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    <p1>product_nxt[15:0] = 0.</p1>
    <p2>For each bit in the multiplier (B[7:0]):</p2>
    <p3>if the bit is 1, add A to the product at the position determined by the current shift value.</p3>
    <p4>shift_temp = shift + 1.</p4>
    <p5>shift_nxt = shift_temp.</p5>
    <p6>product_temp_nxt[15:0] = product_nxt[15:0].</p6>
    <p7>For each bit in the multiplier (B[7:0]):</p7>
    <p8>if the bit is 1, calculate the partial product by adding A to the product_temp at the position determined by the current shift value.</p8>
    <p9>shift_temp_nxt = shift + 1.</p9>
    <p10>if the shift_temp_nxt is 1, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p10>
    <p11>if the shift_temp_nxt is 2, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p11>
    <p12>if the shift_temp_nxt is 3, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p12>
    <p13>if the shift_temp_nxt is 4, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p13>
    <p14>if the shift_temp_nxt is 5, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p14>
    <p15>if the shift_temp_nxt is 6, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p15>
    <p16>if the shift_temp_nxt is 7, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p16>
    <p17>if the shift_temp_nxt is 8, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p17>
    <p18>if the shift_temp_nxt is 9, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p18>
    <p19>if the shift_temp_nxt is 10, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p19>
    <p20>if the shift_temp_nxt is 11, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p20>
    <p21>if the shift_temp_nxt is 12, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p21>
    <p22>if the shift_temp_nxt is 13, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p22>
    <p23>if the shift_temp_nxt is 14, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p23>
    <p24>if the shift_temp_nxt is 15, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p24>
    <p25>if the shift_temp_nxt is 16, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p25>
    <p26>if the shift_temp_nxt is 17, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p26>
    <p27>if the shift_temp_nxt is 18, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p27>
    <p28>if the shift_temp_nxt is 19, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p28>
    <p29>if the shift_temp_nxt is 20, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p29>
    <p30>if the shift_temp_nxt is 21, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p30>
    <p31>if the shift_temp_nxt is 22, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p31>
    <p32>if the shift_temp_nxt is 23, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p32>
    <p33>if the shift_temp_nxt is 24, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p33>
    <p34>if the shift_temp_nxt is 25, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p34>
    <p35>if the shift_temp_nxt is 26, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p35>
    <p36>if the shift_temp_nxt is 27, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p36>
    <p37>if the shift_temp_nxt is 28, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p37>
    <p38>if the shift_temp_nxt is 29, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p38>
    <p39>if the shift_temp_nxt is 30, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p39>
    <p40>if the shift_temp_nxt is 31, add the partial product to the product_temp.</p40>
    <p41>product_nxt = product_temp.</p41>
    <p42>shift_nxt = shift.</p42>
    </implementation>
</module>
samples.tb_log:

   20 |                 partial_product = partial_product + (A << i);
      |                                                        ^~
                ... Use "/* verilator lint_off WIDTH */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.

                                  : ... In instance multi_8bit
    8 |     reg [3:0] shift_count;
      |               ^~~~~~~~~~~
%Warning-UNUSED: multi_8bit.v:10:16: Signal is not used: 'accumulator'
                                   : ... In instance multi_8bit
   10 |     reg [15:0] accumulator;
      |                ^~~~~~~~~~~

[RUN]
